title: Date choosing is not flexible
excerpt:
When I want to choose a specifc date in the date column, it goes to this calendar view. 
It is annoying and frustraing. I just want to type in the date and move on with my life, let’s say: 22/01/2023.

posts.author: Gal5252 (Gal)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I want to choose a specifc date in the date column, it goes to this calendar view.
It is annoying and frustraing. I just want to type in the date and move on with my life, let’s say: 22/01/2023.
